query: How do I submit a warranty claim?

retrieved_chunks.text: Customers may submit warranty claims through the online support portal. A valid proof of purchase must be attached to the claim form. Claims without proof of purchase are automatically rejected by the system.

The warranty department reviews submitted claims within five business days. Approved claims result in a replacement unit or store credit at the company's discretion. Shipping costs for returns are covered by the customer.

final_answer: Submit your warranty claim through the support portal within 90 days of purchase. Attach proof of purchase and reference warranty code WRAP-9901. Approved claims receive a $299 store credit.
